grant_title: MSt in AI Ethics and Society
eligible_applicant_type: Students with a good UK undergraduate degree (2.1 or equivalent)
geographic_restrictions: Primarily UK-based with in-person teaching in Cambridge; international students may attend with visitor immigration permission.
project_area: AI Ethics and Society, focusing on ethical and societal challenges of AI including privacy, surveillance, justice, fairness, algorithmic bias, misinformation, Big Data, and responsible innovation.
demographic_requirements: Applicants must demonstrate a commitment to and aptitude for advancing the ethical use of AI in society. English language proficiency is required for non-native speakers.
eligibility_summary: Open to students with a variety of backgrounds and professional experiences. Standard entry requires a 2.1 UK undergraduate degree or equivalent, but non-standard applications with relevant professional experience are encouraged. Applicants must be able to attend teaching sessions in the UK.
